overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tribal coastal village at sunset. The character moves from enclosed wooden walkways through the village, transitions to open coastal overlooks, and walks along weathered wooden piers extending over the ocean as the sun sets, creating dramatic golden and purple-pink lighting across the water and sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village interior with elevated rope bridges

events.description: approaching the edge of the village interior, first glimpse of coastal overlook ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tribal village on elevated wooden walkways, passing under rope bridges

notable_agents.action: tribal villager walking toward camera carrying goods
villager standing near wooden structure observing the surroundings

entered.detail: thick rope and wooden plank bridge spanning across the walkway above
multi-level wooden hut with thatched roofing and tribal decorations
weathered wooden plank pathway with rope railings
colorful tribal fabric hangings attached to wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a tribal village interior constructed of weathered wood, passing under rope bridges and alongside decorated longhouses. The space is semi-covered with filtered sunlight, and a few NPC villagers are visible walking or standing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with descending wooden steps

events.description: exits the covered village interior onto open coastal overlook with ocean view
sun becomes visible over the ocean, creating strong backlighting and lens flare

agents.ego_description: moving down wooden steps toward the lower coastal level, overlooking the expansive ocean

entered.detail: calm sea with gentle waves and sun reflection
steep rocky coastline with wooden structures built against it
lower wooden dock extending over the water below
bright sun low on the horizon creating golden light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide coastal overlook as the character descends wooden steps. The ocean stretches to the horizon with the setting sun creating brilliant backlighting. Rocky cliffs rise on the right while wooden pier structures extend over the water below.

events.description: turning left to follow the coastal path with ocean now on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the weathered wooden coastal pier with ocean waves visible on the left, navigating around debris

entered.detail: thick vertical wooden pillars supporting the pier structure
scattered broken planks and driftwood along the walkway
rock formations rising from the ocean surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a weathered wooden pier extending over the ocean, with wooden support posts visible on the left and scattered debris on the right. The sun continues to set, casting long shadows across the planks while distant rocky islands dot the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of coastal pier at water level

events.description: sky transitions to deeper purple and pink hues as sun nears horizon
slowing to a stop at the end of the pier overlooking the sunset

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the wooden pier and stopping to face the setting sun over the ocean

notable_agents.action: distant tribal figure standing on rocks near the water's edge

entered.detail: distant boundary where the ocean meets the colorful sky
dramatic cloud formations illuminated in purple and pink by the setting sun

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the pier as the sky erupts in vibrant purple and pink sunset colors. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting a brilliant reflection across the water. The camera stops at the wooden edge of the structure, overlooking the expansive ocean and dramatic cloud-filled sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed interior of a tribal village out toward a vast, open ocean at sunset. It begins by weaving through weathered wooden walkways and decorated longhouses under filtered sunlight, passing beneath rope bridges and nearby villagers. As the character descends a set of wooden steps, the scene opens into a wide coastal overlook where rocky cliffs meet a brilliant, backlit horizon. The camera then follows the path along a weathered pier extending over the water, moving past support posts and scattered debris while the sun casts long shadows across the planks. Finally, the movement concludes at the edge of the pier as the sky erupts in vibrant purple and pink hues, overlooking a shimmering reflection of the low sun across the expansive ocean.
